name: SOUTH DAKOTA SOYBEAN PROCESSORS LLC
business: South Dakota Soybean Processors, LLC processes locally grown soybeans into soybean meal, hulls, and soybean oil, and also sells contracting services for the construction and management of oilseed processing facilities. Its products are sold as livestock feed, to food, biodiesel, and chemical industries, and its services target other processors.
sellsTo: Resellers, feed mills, and livestock producers

exposures.sentence: Our core business consists of processing locally grown soybeans into two main products, soybean meal and hulls, as well as soybean oil and related oil byproducts.
We market and sell multiple grades of soybean oil, in either crude or refined formats, to food, biodiesel and chemical industries.
We market and sell multiple grades of soybean oil, in either crude or refined formats, to food, biodiesel and chemical industries.
We also market and sell contracting services for the construction and management of oilseed processing facilities.

catalysts.event: Completion and start-up of Mitchell facility
catalysts.sentence: Construction of the Mitchell facility was completed and start-up operations commenced in October 2025.
We anticipate spending approximately $28.2 million in capital purchases and improvements in 2026.

catalysts.event: First quarterly principal payment on delayed-draw term loan
catalysts.sentence: Principal payments of $4.5 million are made quarterly beginning six months after the completion date of the Mitchell facility.

catalysts.event: First annual payment on South Dakota loan
catalysts.sentence: Beginning in October 2026, we will make annual principal and interest payments of $987,500.

tamClaims.claim: U.S. soybean production in 2025 was approximately 4.26 billion bushels (27% of world), Brazil 6.5 billion (42%), Argentina 1.8 billion (11%).
tamClaims.sentence: The USDA reports that, for the 2025 crop year, the U.S. produced approximately 4.26 billion bushels of soybeans, or approximately 27% of estimated world production; Brazil produced 6.5 billion bushels, or 42% of estimated world production; and Argentina produced 1.8 billion bushels, or 11% of estimated world production.

tamClaims.claim: South Dakota soybean production in 2025 was approximately 243 million bushels.
tamClaims.sentence: In 2025, agricultural producers in South Dakota grew and harvested approximately 243 million bushels of soybeans.

tamClaims.claim: The company's processing facilities represent approximately 2.7% of total U.S. soybean processing capacity.
tamClaims.sentence: Our processing facilities represent approximately 2.7% of the total soybean processing capacity in the United States.
